seo.title: Franchise Restaurant Software — Centralized | Gastro Master
seo.description: Build your franchise system digitally: unified app, online shop, and POS for all locations. Centrally managed, 0% commission. Get your free consultation now.

hero.subtitle: Gastro Master delivers the complete digital infrastructure for your franchise system — app, online shop, POS system, and website, centrally managed, uniformly branded.
hero.geoText: A franchise system in the gastronomy industry enables successful restaurateurs to scale their proven concept across multiple locations — with uniform branding, central management, and standardized processes. The franchise industry generated a total revenue of €149.2 billion in Germany in 2024, with 193,920 active businesses (Source: German Franchise Association).

stats.title: The Market Is Growing — Your System Must Keep Up
stats.subtitle: Franchise gastronomy is one of the most stable growth segments in the German economy — also for restaurateurs who want to [build their own delivery service](/loesungen/lieferservice-gruenden) and scale.

problem.title: Without Unified Technology: No Real Franchise System
problem.subtitle: Scaling without scaling the infrastructure means losing control.

items.title: Fragmented Systems
items.text: Every location uses a different system — no uniform branding, no central control over menus, prices, or opening hours. A [unified POS system for all locations](/produkte/kassensystem) creates the foundation.

items.title: No Overall View
items.text: No consolidated revenue data — analytics only available per location, strategic decisions become guesswork.

items.title: Growth Blocked
items.text: Every new location means new setup effort. Technology becomes a brake instead of a lever for scaling.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Gastro Franchising
faq.subtitle: The questions franchise owners ask — and our answers

items.q: How do I build a franchise system in the gastronomy industry?
items.a: Building a gastro franchise system starts with a proven concept that can be standardized. You need a uniform brand concept, standardized processes, and a digital infrastructure that connects all locations. Gastro Master provides the technical foundation: [App](/produkte/app), [Online Shop](/produkte/webshop), [POS System](/produkte/kassensystem), and [Website](/produkte/webseite) — centrally managed, uniformly branded. You focus on the concept, we handle the technology.

items.q: What software does a gastro franchise need?
items.a: For a professional gastro franchise system, you need at minimum: a central [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) for all locations, a custom [ordering app](/produkte/app) or [online shop](/produkte/webshop) (0% commission), a uniform [web presence](/produkte/webseite), and a management system for menus, prices, and analytics. Gastro Master offers all of this from one source — without multiple subscriptions and without technical fragmentation.

items.q: What does the digital infrastructure for a franchise system cost?
items.a: Costs depend on the number of locations and the desired feature set. Gastro Master works with a fixed monthly fee per location — no hidden fees, no commissions. Unlike custom development (6–18 months, own IT team) or a multi-vendor mix (multiple subscriptions, no central control), you get everything from one source. All options and pricing can be found in the [pricing overview](/preise) or contact us for a custom quote.

items.q: How do I manage orders across multiple franchise locations?
items.a: With Gastro Master, you manage all locations through a central dashboard. Menus, prices, and opening hours can be controlled across all locations or individually. Orders go directly into the respective [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) — no third parties, no commission. Consolidated analytics give you a complete overview of your entire franchise network at any time.

items.q: Does every franchise location need its own app?
items.a: No. With Gastro Master, all locations in your franchise system use the same [App](/produkte/app) platform — uniformly branded but with location-specific menus and prices. Your customers download the app once and can order from any location. This strengthens brand loyalty and prevents each franchisee from building their own technical solution.
